name: verum
description: Defensive AI trust-testing and release-readiness evidence for owned systems.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/server/public && cp -r server/public/. dist/server/public/
scripts.test:logic: node --test -r ts-node/register engine/assessment.test.ts engine/targets.test.ts engine/bridge/verumBridge.test.ts server/access.test.ts server/api.test.ts server/bridge-runs.test.ts server/ops/armory.test.ts server/ops/redaction.test.ts server/public/js/api-client.test.js server/public/js/target-form.test.js server/public/js/armory-ui.test.js server/public/js/bridge-runs.test.js tools/verum-trace.test.mjs
scripts.smoke: npm run build --silent && node dist/engine/cli.js list
scripts.verify:release: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:logic && npm run smoke
